gt_sql: SELECT T1.account_id FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.duration > 24 AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.date) < '1997' ORDER BY T1.amount ASC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT l.account_id
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE l.duration > 24 
  AND a.date < '1997-01-01'
  AND l.amount = (
    SELECT MIN(l2.amount)
    FROM loan l2
    JOIN account a2 ON l2.account_id = a2.account_id
    WHERE l2.duration > 24 
      AND a2.date < '1997-01-01'
  )
question: Among the accounts who have loan validity more than 24 months, list out the accounts that have the lowest approved amount and have account opening date before 1997.
